notes: EU AI governance frameworks including ALTAI self-assessment tool, Ethics Guidelines for Trustworthy AI, and the EU AI Act's control requirements (risk categories, prohibited practices).

match_nodes.description: European AI Office — implements and enforces the EU AI Act

data.notes: Established by Commission Decision of January 24, 2024 (published February 14, 2024, entered into force February 21, 2024); sits within DG CONNECT. Develops evaluation tools for general-purpose AI models, coordinates enforcement with national/EU bodies, runs the AI Board secretariat, and supports standardisation and regulatory sandboxes for secid:regulation/europa.eu/ai-act.
